# 🛒 Blinkit Sales Analytics Dashboard – Power BI

## 📊 Overview
Interactive Power BI dashboard analyzing Blinkit's sales data.

## 🔑 Key Insights
- Total Sales: $1.20M
- Avg Rating: 3.9
- 8,523 items analyzed
- Tier 3 outlets generate highest sales

## 🛠 Tools Used
Power BI | DAX | Data Visualization
